case_title: RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC VS. RUI X HU A/K/A RUIXUN XUN HU et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUI X HU A/K/A RUIXUN XUN HU DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-2012
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC SERVED MAR-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUI X HU A/K/A RUIXUN XUN HU
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC SERVED MAR-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUI X HU A/K/A RUIXUN XUN HU
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
